description: Left-handed batters generally struggle against left-arm orthodox spin due to natural angle
source: LHB vs left-arm spin dismissal rate: 0.037/ball vs 0.024/ball average (Cricsheet T20 2015-2026)

description: Right-handed batters on spin tracks against wrist spinners show higher dismissal rates

description: Off-break bowlers thrive at Chepauk due to rough outside the right-hander's off-stump
